ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Mangini for Divina Agpoon-Sachen (Petitioner).

The Court noted that it got the certified copy of the order admitting the will in Missouri, informed Counsel that the Probate Examiner is out on vacation and stated that Examiner needs to review it. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
